headline: Homan 🛡️🇺🇸 Offers ICE Pullback 😴🚪 If Walz-Frey Simps Cooperate 🤝😤
text:
Trump's BORDER CZAR 👑🛡️ Tom Homan 🕶️🔥 DROPPING TEA ☕📢 in Minneapolis 🏙️❄️: Fed agents 🚔💪 might GTFO 🚪💨 if local cucks like Tim 'Tampon' Walz 👨‍🍼😩 and Jacob Frey 🤡🏛️ play NICE 🤝🍆 and STOP sanctuary city LARPING 🛡️🚫! After Renee Good & Alex Pretti 💀🩸 got ZAPPED ⚡🍆 by ICE goons during OP METRO SURGE 🥷🏙️ – 3K DHS BADASSES 🛡️📈 flooding the streets, outnumbering local PD 600:4000 😱🍑 – protests ERUPTING 🔥🗽 nationwide, Capitol Hill SIMPS 🤡📜 from BOTH sides RAGING 😡💥!

Homan: 'Not SURRENDERING 🚫🙌, just SMARTER TARGETING 🎯😏 – President Trump 🍊🦅 wants this FIXED 🔧💪, and DADDY Homan's on it!' Walz & Frey DEMANDING full WITHDRAWAL 🏃‍♂️🚪, suing to HALT the SURGE 💥🛑, but admin BLASTS 'em 🧂🔥 for NO-COOP vibes. Trump already CHATTED 📞🍆 with the Dem duo post-Pretti POP 💥 – de-escalate MODE ACTIVATED 😌📉 after streets BOILING 🔥🛣️ and GOP SENATORS 🚫📜 blocking DHS FUNDING 💰🚫 with Schumer's DEMS 🤝🧢!

ICE SLAYING DEPORTATIONS 📈🚀 – 480K+ YANKED 👋🌎 in Trump's FIRST YEAR 🔥🇺🇸, SMASHING Obama's 410K RECORD 🏆😤, 75K+ in CAGES 🏰🔒 RN! Homan SIDELINES Border Patrol simp Gregory Bovino 🥱📉 who botched Chicago vibes 🏙️😩. Frey WHINING 😭: 'Agents YANKING AMERICANS 🇺🇸🍑 off streets cuz they LOOK MEXICAN/ECUADORIAN/SOMALI 🧕🇸🇴 – NOT AMERICA WAY 🚫🦅!' Homan: 'COOP or NO DRAW-DOWN 📉😈 – sanctuary policy? CUCKED 🐔🚫!'

Congress DRAMA 👯‍♂️💥: 7 GOP + Dems BLOCK spending VOTE 🚫📜, Trump TWEETS 🐦📱 'DEAL MADE 🤝 – FUND GOV til SEPTEMBER 📅✅, DHS LATER 🛡️⏳!' Schumer SCREAMS 🗣️😡 'ICE THUGGERY 👹🚨 – NO MASKS 😷🚫, NO WARRANTLESS YANKS 🍆💥!' Trump in CABINET 😎👑: 'Working with Dems to AVOID SHUTDOWN 🛑😌.' Frey at MAYORS CONF 👨‍💼🎤 still BEGGING 'END OP NOW 🚪🙏!' But Homan's like 'MISSION BRRRR 🇺🇸🔒 – borders TIGHTER 🛡️📈, America SAFER 🦅💯!' Wall Street? Nah, this is WALL BUILDING 🧱🇺🇸 – locals COOP or KEEP THE SURGE 🥷🚀‼️
